cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]dvě rovnoběžné čáry[/hlp]. První čára je [hlp]dlouhá 60 pixelů[/hlp], pak [hlp]zvedněte pero[/hlp], otočte se doprava, přesuňte se o 30 pixelů, otočte se doleva, [hlp]spusťte pero[/hlp] a nakreslete druhou čáru dlouhou 60 pixelů.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_left"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
